name: netnewswire-mcp-dev
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) ~/.gnupg && chmod 700 ~/.gnupg && sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) ~/.claude && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && echo 'alias claude="claude --dangerously-skip-permissions"' >> ~/.zshrc && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && npm install -g typescript-language-server typescript && npm ci
